subject: P1: UPI switch failing — success rate 71%
body: UPI transactions failing since 06:01 IST. Success rate dropped to 71% (SLA 99%). AxisPay PSP timing out. ~2.9% of txns affected and climbing. NOC bridge open. Need a call on invoking DR.

subject: RBI/2026-27/44 — Card tokenisation, 90-day compliance window
body: All scheduled commercial banks must complete card-on-file tokenisation per the attached circular within 90 days. Non-compliance attracts supervisory action.

subject: Re: AxisPay — 3rd SLA breach this quarter
body: This is AxisPay's third breach this quarter. Contract clause 7.2 lets us withhold 1.2L and issue a formal breach notice. Recommend we proceed. Need your sign-off to send.

subject: CDN contract renewal — expires in 12 days
body: Your Akamai CDN contract (1.2Cr annual) expires on 2026-07-28. Renewal terms attached, flat year-on-year. Please confirm to avoid a lapse in coverage.

subject: Merchant complaint — failed settlement, account 5029384711220091
body: Large merchant reports a failed UPI settlement of Rs 4,20,000 to account 5029384711220091, UPI id ramesh@okhdfcbank. Merchant threatening to move to a competitor. Contact +91 98200 41122.

subject: Release 18 readiness at 71% — ships in 6 days
body: Payments Core Release 18 is at 71% readiness with 6 days to go. Two P2 defects open. We think we make it but wanted it on your radar. No action needed yet.

subject: Fintech Weekly: UPI hits 20B monthly transactions
body: This week in fintech: UPI crosses 20 billion monthly transactions, RBI signals new rails, and more. Read online.

subject: Board pack due Thursday — need your products section
body: The board pack is due Thursday. Can you get me the Products section (KPIs + the UPI incident summary) by EOD Wednesday? Template attached.

subject: Scheduled maintenance: internal wiki down Sat 2-4am
body: The internal wiki will be unavailable Saturday 2-4am for maintenance. No action required.

subject: App store rating dropped to 4.1 after v8.3
body: Play Store rating fell from 4.3 to 4.1 in 48h, mostly login complaints tied to v8.3. Investigating with mobile team. Will update by noon. Flagging for visibility.

subject: NPCI advisory: elevated UPI decline rates network-wide
body: NPCI is observing elevated decline rates across several member banks this morning. Investigation ongoing. Please monitor your switch and report anomalies.

subject: You appeared in 12 searches this week
body: Your profile appeared in 12 searches this week. See who's viewing your profile.
